---
package: "openpipeline_spatial"
version: "v0.5.0"
title: "from_h5mu_to_spatialexperiment"
namespace: "Convert"
description: "Converts an h5mu file into a SpatialExperiment object"
type: "module"
toc: false
latest: "true"
subtitle: "openpipeline_spatial v0.5.0"
---

::: {.column-margin}

### Info

ID: `from_h5mu_to_spatialexperiment`  
Namespace: `convert`

### Links

[{{< fa brands github >}} View source code](https://github.com/openpipelines-bio/openpipeline_spatial/tree/v0.5.0/src/convert/from_h5mu_to_spatialexperiment)

[![](/images/viash-hub-logo.svg){.vh-icon} Browse all versions](https://www.viash-hub.com/packages/openpipeline_spatial)

[![](/images/viash-hub-logo.svg){.vh-icon} Get run instructions](https://www.viash-hub.com/packages/openpipeline_spatial/v0.5.0/components/convert/from_h5mu_to_spatialexperiment)

:::



## Example commands

You can run the pipeline using `nextflow run`.

### View help

You can use `--help` as a parameter to get an overview of the possible parameters.

```bash
nextflow run openpipelines-bio/openpipeline_spatial \
  -r v0.5.0 -latest \
  -main-script target/nextflow/convert/from_h5mu_to_spatialexperiment/main.nf \
  --help
```

### Run command

<details>
<summary>Example of `params.yaml`</summary>

Generate a `params.yaml` for this component on [Viash Hub](https://www.viash-hub.com/packages/openpipeline_spatial/v0.5.0/components/convert/from_h5mu_to_spatialexperiment).

</details>

Run locally with:

```bash
nextflow run openpipelines-bio/openpipeline_spatial \
  -r v0.5.0 -latest \
  -profile docker \
  -main-script target/nextflow/convert/from_h5mu_to_spatialexperiment/main.nf \
  -params-file params.yaml
```

:::{.callout-note}
Replace `-profile docker` with `-profile podman` or `-profile singularity` depending on the desired backend.
:::

Running on Seqera or through Viash Hub is explained in the [guides](/guides/index.qmd).

## Argument group

### Arguments

|Name                         |Description                                                                                                                     |Attributes                                |
|:----------|:--------------------------------------------------|:--------------------|
|`--input`                    |Input h5mu file                                                                                                                 |`file`, required, example: `"input.h5mu"` |
|`--modality`                 |Name of the modality to be converted.                                                                                           |`string`, required, default: `"rna"`      |
|`--obsm_spatial_coordinates` |Key in the .obsm field that contains the spatial coordinates.  Will be mapped to spatialCoords in the SpatialExperiment object. |`string`                                  |
|`--output`                   |Output SpatialExperiment file                                                                                                   |`file`, required, example: `"output.rds"` |

## Authors


  * Dorien Roosen [{{< fa brands github >}}](https://github.com/dorien-er) [{{< fa brands linkedin >}}](https://linkedin.com/in/dorien-roosen) (author)
